name: telegram
description: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

bot_token.title: Bot token
bot_token.description: Token from @BotFather (format: 123456789:AAH...). Stored in your system keychain. Leave blank if you prefer to set it later via /telegram:configure <token>.
